title: Prismatic Agora
public_claim: Prismatic Agora is a completed MuranoOS authority packet for a room-as-operating-system.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes a room's purpose, roles, instruments, deliberation spaces, memory, governance rules, and export surfaces into one operating design so the room can host coordinated intellectual work.
use_value: It matters because collaborative knowledge work needs more than files: it needs a governed place where roles, evidence, disagreement, memory, and decisions can meet.

component_proofs.expected_output: bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder to construct
component_proofs.current_evidence: Expected proof artifact: bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder to construct
component_proofs.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Prismatic Agora Handoff Identity; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.
